---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability for the framework
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What's missing or painful right now?

## Proposal

What should change?

## Scope

- [ ] New agent definition under `core/.claude/agents/`
- [ ] New slash command under `core/.claude/commands/`
- [ ] New template under `core/templates/`
- [ ] New asset pipeline script under `core/tools/`
- [ ] Observer improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Reusability check

Will this benefit games other than the one I'm currently working on? If no, it belongs in `games/<name>/`, not `core/`.

## Out of scope

What does this explicitly *not* try to solve?
